# Technical Design Document Template

## 1. Overview
- **Story:** [STORY-XXX](link-to-issue)
- **Author:** AI Agent / Architect Name
- **Status:** Draft | In Review | Approved | Implemented
- **Created:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Last Updated:** YYYY-MM-DD

## 2. Requirements Summary
_Summarize the user story and acceptance criteria._

## 3. Proposed Solution

### 3.1 API Design
_OpenAPI-style endpoint specifications._

### 3.2 Data Model Changes
_New entities, fields, or schema changes._

### 3.3 Service Layer Design
_New service methods, business logic, validation rules._

### 3.4 Sequence Diagram
_Mermaid sequence diagram showing the request flow._

## 4. Dependencies & Impact
_Affected services, libraries, configuration changes._

## 5. Testing Strategy
_Unit test plan, integration test plan, edge cases._

## 6. Risks & Mitigations
_Technical risks and how to address them._

## 7. Approval

| Role | Name | Decision | Date |
|------|------|----------|------|
| Architect | | Pending | |
